sections.paragraph:
Original: אלה

Transliteration: 'âlâh

Phonetic: aw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. to swear, curse
    1. (Qal)
      1. to swear, take an oath (before God)
      2. to curse
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to put under oath, adjure
      2. to put under a curse

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 94

Part(s) of speech: Verb
